category_sources: source_facts.description says secure password manager CLI with GPG and git sync; official GitHub README describes prs as a terminal password manager using GPG and git.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is prs; official README title is prs.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the best documentation surface and includes features, usage, requirements, install, build, security, and FAQ sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/timvisee/prs, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe GPG-secured secret storage, git synchronization, password generation, and TOTP support.
